title: Palo Alto Networks security advisory (AV26-228)
description: On March 11, 2026, Palo Alto Networks published security advisories to address vulnerabilities in the following products:
products: Cortex XDR Broker VM 30.0.0&bsp;  versions prior to 30.0.49
Cortex XDR Agent 8.7-CE&bsp;  versions prior to 8.7.101-CE on macOS
Cortex XDR Agent 8.3-CE&bsp;  versions prior to 8.3.102-CE on macOS
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
